title: 28 Blocks Later
description: This mod adds the rage virus from 28 Days later and it's sequals, 28 Weeks Later and 28 Years later.
body:
28 Blocks Later is a hardcore infection mod inspired by the Rage Virus from 28 Days Later. Infection is instant. Death is certain. Escape is a lie.
☣️ Core Features:

    Rage Virus Infection

        Players can be infected after contact with Rage Zombies.

        30% infection chance.

        A 28-second timer begins — once it ends, you die and turn.

    Bitten Effect

        If you die while infected, a Rage Zombie is spawned in your place.

        Survive the timer? Doesn’t matter. You’ll be killed and replaced anyway.

    Rage Zombies

        Speed: Faster than a sprinting player.

        Attack: Deals 5 damage per hit.

        Health: 28 HP (you know why).

        Range: 100-block tracking — you're never out of sight.

    Corpse System

        Corpses drop guts and rotten flesh. Right-click to harvest.

        These are used to brew Infected Blood — a bottle of death.

    Brewing Recipes

        Mix Guts + Rotten Flesh into a potion to create the virus in a bottle.

        Drink it to die. Or infect others. Your choice.

    Risky Cures

        Drinking milk removes the effect… but that counts as “expired.” You’ll still die and turn. Try it, see what happens.

💀 Why Play This?

    Adds tense survival mechanics with infection-based gameplay.

    Doesn’t require custom models — 100% blocky horror.

    You will die. That’s part of the fun.

🧪 Infected. Alone. Outnumbered.

How long can you last?
